warnings: Zotero MCP metadata and children calls returned user-cancelled, and local Zotero HTTP access was sandbox-blocked.
The local Zotero SQLite item table did not contain UIWZD5EE; the TPL manifest identified the item but reported pdf_present=false and si_present=false.

Analysis used fallback sources: publisher page https://www.nature.com/articles/s41558-021-01032-7 plus an author-uploaded preprint page https://www.researchgate.net/publication/351376346_Potential_and_risks_of_hydrogen-based_e-fuels_in_climate_change_mitigation.
Main PDF attachment key is unresolved because no Zotero child attachment was available.
Preexisting codex logs in .raw/papers/UIWZD5EE/ make total directory size exceed the lightweight-stub target; the seven required stubs total about 9.1 KB.
deviations_from_contract: Zotero MCP resolution and main-PDF fulltext retrieval were unavailable, so the page was completed through the documented publisher/preprint fallback instead of a Zotero main PDF.
